content: update: you can now export into morimens!

this is really cool, spent the time setting up my inventory to give it a go 🙂 just one thing that i see which may need fixing for generating d-tide teams is that it currently uses duplicate posse, not sure if intentional or not for how the generation works (as in is it generating 5 different teams you can try or is it suggesting use all 5 of these teams). just thought i would let you know incase
maybe also presetting anyone with a base 5/5 in gnostic potential to that already just to save a bit of setup time as well?
ooo i see i see! thank you so so much for the feedback, this really helps a lot!! i think i’ll be able to fix this by tomorrow
oh is gnostic automatically leveled? sorry i lowkey forgot lol
i think all the non standard characters start with 5/5 already and the standard characters are 0/5 and will need to be levelled
ooo wait that is good to know tysm
